comments.text: Working PR #179 code-quality bot feedback. Will detect the one already manually fixed and apply minimal patches for the remaining suggestions, then run targeted validation and update PR #179.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied remaining three github-code-quality suggestions from PR #179: removed unused json import, removed unused processed_text local, and simplified YesOrNoClassifier return path to remove unreachable branch. Validation: pytest plexus/rca_analysis_test.py and pytest plexus/cli/dataset/curation_test.py.
